task_description: Create a Flutter translator app with speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and MyMemory translation API integration. Beautiful Material Design 3 UI with large speak button. CI/CD via GitHub Actions building for Web, Android, and Windows with automatic releases.

verification.summary: All three platform builds (Web, Android APK, Windows EXE) succeeded. GitHub Release v1.0.5 created with all artifacts attached.
